metadata.title: Image Zoom & Drag
metadata.description: Add zoom and drag functionality to diagrams from Mermaid, Plantuml, Graphviz, Gravizo and so on

regex.source: Notice("Invalid range. Please enter number in range 100-1000px")
regex.target: Notice("范围无效。请输入 100 - 1000px 范围内的数字")

regex.source: Notice("Something went wrong. The video is missing.")
Notice("Settings have been reset to default.")
Notice(`Native touches are ${t?"enabled":"disabled"} now. \n            You ${t?"cannot":"can"} move and pinch zoom diagram diagram.`)
regex.target: Notice(`原生触摸操作现在已${t?"启用":"禁用"}。\n            你${t?"不能":"可以"}移动和捏合缩放图表。`)

regex.source: Notice("Oops! We couldn't find any elements to export. It seems something is wrong with this diagram?.")
regex.target: Notice("哎呀！我们找不到任何可导出的元素。这个图表似乎有问题。")

regex.source: .error("React Router caught the following error during render",e,t)
regex.target: .error("React Router 在渲染期间捕获到以下错误",e,t)

regex.source: .error("Neither SVG nor IMG element found in the container")
regex.target: .error("容器中未找到 SVG 或 IMG 元素")

regex.source: name:"Visit GitHub page of this plugin"
regex.target: name:"访问此插件的 GitHub 页面"

regex.source: name:"Automatically collapse diagrams on focus change?"
regex.target: name:"焦点改变时自动折叠图表吗？"

regex.source: name:"How to find selectors in DevTool"
regex.target: name:"如何在开发者工具中查找选择器"

regex.source: name:"Hide panels when mouse leaves diagram?"
regex.target: name:"鼠标离开图表时隐藏面板吗？"

regex.source: name:"Add a hiding button to service panel?"
regex.target: name:"在服务面板中添加一个隐藏按钮吗？"

regex.source: name:"Toggle control panel visibility of current active diagram"
regex.target: name:"切换当前活动图表的控制面板可见性"

regex.source: .setName("Are you sure you want to switch the page? You will lose your unsaved changes.")
regex.target: .setName("你确定要切换页面吗？你将丢失未保存的更改。")

regex.source: .setDesc("These settings will only apply to this diagram.")
.setTooltip("Go to GitHub page of this plugin")
regex.target: .setTooltip("前往此插件的 GitHub 页面")

regex.source: .setTooltip("Cancel operation? All changes will be lost.")
.setTooltip(`Set what controls will be active for ${i[m(s)].name} diagram`)
.setTooltip("Click for more information on how the plugin works and how you can find diagram selectors")
regex.target: .setTooltip("点击了解此插件的工作原理以及如何查找图表选择器的更多信息")

regex.source: .addDesc("This plugin stores data related to your selected elements.")
regex.target: .addDesc("此插件会存储与你所选元素相关的数据。")

regex.source: .addDesc("When you open another Markdown file with a diagram code in it and switch to preview mode, the plugin attempts to find the corresponding diagram in preview.")
regex.target: .addDesc("当你打开另一个包含图表代码的 Markdown 文件并切换到预览模式时，插件会尝试在预览中找到对应的图表。")

regex.source: .addDesc("If a matching diagram is found, the plugin creates a container, applies CSS styles, and enables diagram movement, zooming, and adds a control panel.")
regex.target: .addDesc("如果找到匹配的图表，插件会创建一个容器，应用 CSS 样式，启用图表的移动、缩放功能，并添加一个控制面板。")

regex.source: .addDesc("1. Open the markdown file in Obsidian where the diagram is. You should switch to preview mode.")
regex.target: .addDesc("1. 在 Obsidian 中打开包含图表的 Markdown 文件。你应该切换到预览模式。")

regex.source: .addDesc("2. Open the DevTools window. You can do it by pressing CTRL + SHIFT + I.")
regex.target: .addDesc("2. 打开开发者工具窗口。你可以通过按下 CTRL + SHIFT + I 来打开。")

regex.source: .addDesc('3. Click the "Select an element on this page to inspect it" button (usually a arrow icon) in the top-left corner of the DevTools window. You can also press CTRL + SHIFT + C')
regex.target: .addDesc('3. 点击开发者工具窗口左上角的“选择此页面上的元素进行检查”按钮（通常是一个箭头图标）。你也可以按下 CTRL + SHIFT + C')

regex.source: .addDesc("4. Move your cursor over the diagram and click on it to select the element.")
regex.target: .addDesc("4. 将光标移到图表上并点击以选择该元素。")

regex.source: .addDesc("5. In the Elements tab of DevTools, you will see the HTML element corresponding to the diagram highlighted.")
regex.target: .addDesc("5. 在开发者工具的“元素”选项卡中，你会看到与图表对应的 HTML 元素被高亮显示。")

regex.source: .addDesc("6. Look at the classes applied to this element in the DevTools panel to identify the CSS selectors you need.")
regex.target: .addDesc("6. 在开发者工具面板中查看应用于此元素的类，以确定你需要的 CSS 选择器。")

regex.source: .addDesc("• Move Panel: By default located at bottom right - Contains 8 directional buttons for diagram movement")
regex.target: .addDesc("• 移动面板：默认位于右下角 - 包含 8 个用于图表移动的方向按钮")

regex.source: .addDesc("• Zoom Panel: By default located at center right - Features zoom in/out and reset controls")
regex.target: .addDesc("• 缩放面板：默认位于右侧中间 - 具有放大/缩小和重置控制功能")

regex.source: .addDesc("• Service Panel: By default located at upper right - Contains additional functionality buttons")
regex.target: .addDesc("• 服务面板：默认位于右上角 - 包含额外的功能按钮")

regex.source: .addDesc("1. Use checkboxes below to toggle panel visibility on/off")
regex.target: .addDesc("1. 使用下面的复选框来切换面板的可见性。")

regex.source: .addDesc("2. Click and drag any panel to reposition it on the diagram")
regex.target: .addDesc("2. 点击并拖动任何面板以在图表上重新定位它。")

regex.source: .addDesc("4. Reload the view to see your changes take effect")
regex.target: .addDesc("4. 重新加载视图以使你的更改生效。")

regex.source: desc:"To identify the CSS selectors for diagrams on this page, follow these steps below using your browser’s DevTools:"
regex.target: desc:"要识别此页面上图表的 CSS 选择器，请使用浏览器的开发者工具按照以下步骤操作："

regex.source: desc:"Here you can configure which diagrams will receive enhanced controls and UI."
regex.target: desc:"在这里你可以配置哪些图表将获得增强的控件和用户界面。"

regex.source: desc:"Configure the visibility and position of control panels on your diagrams"
regex.target: desc:"配置图表上控制面板的可见性和位置。"

regex.source: desc:"Configure how panels interact with mouse movement"
regex.target: desc:"配置面板如何与鼠标移动进行交互。"

regex.source: .addDescriptions([`Set the container dimensions for ${p.toLowerCase()} state in pixels.`,"Click Save button to apply changes."])
regex.target: .addDescriptions([`以像素为单位设置 ${p.toLowerCase()} 状态下的容器尺寸`, "点击保存按钮以应用更改"])

regex.source: .addDescriptions(["Adding a Diagram Type:","1. Enter a unique name using only Latin letters, numbers and `-` (A-Z, a-z, 0-9, -)","2. Specify a valid CSS selector for your diagram","Once added, matching diagrams will get:","• Mouse and keyboard navigation","• Additional control buttons","Note: Red border indicates invalid input - hover to see details"])
regex.target:
.addDescriptions ([
"添加图表类型：",
"1. 仅使用拉丁字母、数字和 - 输入一个唯一名称（A - Z、a - z、0 - 9、-）",
"2. 为你的图表指定一个有效的 CSS 选择器",
"添加后，匹配的图表将获得：",
"・鼠标和键盘导航功能",
"・额外的控制按钮",
"注意：红色边框表示输入无效 - 将鼠标悬停在上面可查看详情"
])
